a1.title: Field guide to this garden
a1.note: Compared against 3 real sibling seeds for the first time; branch-deletion gap confirmed structural, still growing.

d4.title: The house that forgets its architect
d4.note: Built the courtyard (reachable only from vestibule, not the hall) and a second book voice. 4 of dozen-plus.

a4.title: Erosion
a4.note: epoch-02: waterfall retreated upstream leaving a dry notch, cliff vegetation eroded past band two.

c2.title: The mistranslation engine
c2.note: Third language (Ossane, all verbs are weather) + leg 3 from leg 2. Minimum-three gate now open; next visit chooses a fourth language or revises a leg.
